nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rufous-tailed shama
nodes.summary: Rufous-tailed shama（Rufous-tailed shama，学名 Copsychus pyrropygus），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于蘇門答臘島、婆罗洲、森林，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 蘇門答臘島
nodes.summary: 蘇門答臘島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括罗氏山鹧鸪、蘇門答臘山鷓鴣、長嘴山鶉等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in extreme southern Thailand, Malaysia, Sumatra, and Borneo, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical swamps

links.evidence: It is found in extreme southern Thailand, Malaysia, Sumatra, and Borneo, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical swamps

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found in extreme southern Thailand, Malaysia, Sumatra, and Borneo, where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical swamps

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss. This species was formerly placed in the monotypic genus Trichixos but was moved to Copsychus based on the results of a molecular phylogenetic study published in 2010.{{ cite journal | last1=Sangster | first1=G
